raw_input:
[4.0/5] Great For Body Oils This roller works great with my body oils. It dispenses just enough while smoothly gliding over your skin. I find that putting it in the refrigerator before applying gives the roller a nice cooling effect.

The only issue is that the bottle leaks a little when using and should always remain upright. [5.0/5] Great size and value! Use at home, throw it in your purse, take it to the office! So many uses! Great for perfume, essential oils or even pain oil/cream! I love this size! Comes with lid & even measurement on the side of the bottle! [2.0/5] Fell apart after two uses. I only got to use the product twice before it fell apart when I went to use it the third time.

When it first arrived, I fill the reservoir with some of the oil I have. The roller applied it evenly on my skin. It was smooth and there was no discomfort. However, it did seem that some oil was leaking out of the reservoir as I used it. I also found oil pooling on the bottom of the product.

When I went to use it the third time, the roller itself popped off as I tried removing the cover from it. No matter what I did, even after emptying the reservoir and drying it, the roller would not stay on. Maybe it's a defect with mine, but I had to junk it. [5.0/5] great tool for face massage I was excited to get this Jade Roller Bottle, and was even happier when it arrived! It's a larger size than I thought it was going to be -- larger than a lip gloss roller bottle, maybe 2.5 times the size in diameter, but still a good size for facial massage.

The pink jade roller is very smooth (sometimes they are not), and rolls very easily and doesn't get stuck. But, it doesn't roll as smoothly as say, a stainless steel roller ball. There will be a catch every now and then, but I think that's what you can expect with a natural stone. To me, it's worth it because you get the coolness of the jade, and I suppose some healing qualities, but I'm not sure what the science is on that. But, it's nice and relaxing to use as part of your bedtime routine with some nice oil to moisturize and massage your face. [4.0/5] Next application, but it does leak I used this jade roller on my face with a mixture of essential oil and olive oil. It has a smooth application and goes on nicely and feels good. My only issue is that it is a little messy and does leak from the top. [5.0/5] Great tool for tired eyes I like this jade roller bottle to use on my face. You can add an ice cube or two to the bottle and use it to massage your skin. It really helps shrink pores and helps promotes blood circulation. You can also put serum or lotion in the roller for your face. You could also add essential oil and use it to massage your skin. You can also use it for pain relief when you use ice cubes. This product is easy to use and easy to assemble The instructions are very clear on how to use this jade roller. I would highly recommend this product. [5.0/5] 💆‍♀️ I got this thing to mix an essential oil blend I like using on my skin and not only does it do the job but I did not expect it to be as big as it was! [5.0/5] So big When I ordered this I didn’t realize how bit it really was.I’m able to fit a whole bottle of my serum in it.It would also be great for a cuticle oil on the go.I haven’t been using it long enough to notice a big change with the jade but it does feel nice on my undereye.
6/10 would recommend to a friend. [4.0/5] Big big BIG This roller is BIG! I wanted to try this out for traveling reason to keep down on products. I was able to fill it up with my oils and apply it daily for five days on my entire body. It rolls nicely but it does leak a little so be sure to have the top in tightly. I do appreciate the screw off roller top for easier filling and less mess. It does feel like a little massage when rolling it all over the body. [5.0/5] Great For Oils I was really excited for this purchase.
I’m pregnant and my body oil has a pump that is super messy and I have to act quickly before it drips everywhere.
I was nervous this would spill out the oil, but it’s great!
Some rollers have dry patches when you roll them because the ball gets stuck. This roller was very smooth and have a nice even roll. Extremely happy! It makes traveling with my oil easier too, because my old dispenser was a leak hazard and this has a solid cap! [4.0/5] Not leak proof, but does the trick [[VIDEOID:5546d675e4ced4eb17bff8607e1121a6]] This roller works well if you’re looking for a self-care regimen to reduce puffiness. I like to put a couple or ice cubes inside and use it on my face an neck. It isn’t leakproof, so I’m hesitant to try putting any expensive essential oils in here. I think i’ll stick to ice and water. [5.0/5] Feels so nice! I was initially drawn to this product because I love mixing my own body oils but I never have an easy, non-messy way to apply them. I usually end up using my fingers and the oil can get everywhere. This roller is awesome, especially for applying muscle rubs on myself. I'm able to pinpoint exactly where I want to put the oil without worrying about it getting on everything. Also, the ball does feel like real quartz.

Pros:
- good size roller for easy application
- quartz ball rolls really well
- it has a cooling feel to it without refrigeration
- the bottle is marked with the volumes (up to 30mL) so it would be easy to mix oils directly in the bottle
- the bottle is made of a thick, durable plastic
- easy to clean
- giftable

Cons:
- I worry about the bottle leaking if it isn't kept completely upright
- the bottle is top heavy so if there isn't much liquid in it, it may tip more easily

Overall: This roller is really handy. I love the cooling effect and the bottle capacity. This is something I will be using quite a bit. I recommend it. [4.0/5] A tool i didn't know i needed - This jade roller is surprisingly good. i wasn't expecting much when i ordered it but i was pleasantly surprised.
- The jade stone is very smooth and glides very smoothly on the skin. The quality seem pretty decent.
- I tried using it with oil and was pleased to see that it just dispenses enough oil for massage as i roll it without making a mess.
- I also tried filling the bottle with water (picture attached) just to see how it will hold while inverted and observed there is no leakage when you hold it still.
- I fill it with a little facial oil and store it in the fridge so it is cold when i'm ready to use it.
- My face gets especially dry during winter so treating my face with facial oil is a must and this roller does a very good job of distributing oil on my face evenly and i find it quite relaxing. I'm really enjoying this little tool. Definitely worth the price. This will be a great and unique stocking stuffer for the holidays. Hope this is helpful :) [4.0/5] smooth and no leaks I use this jade roller with ice and with oils for my face. It was very hard trying to find a small enough ice cube to fit through the small opening so I fill it with water and place the bottle in the freezer for a few minutes or until the water turns into ice chips. That has worked perfectly for me and it doesn't leak any water if it tips over, plus it glides very smoothly across my face dispensing the right amount of ice water. When I use it with oil it works just as well so it doesn't lather my face with oil, instead it lightly coats my face before I use a facial tool. The bottle is small enough to fit in my makeup organizer and its very easy to wash. i only fill the bottle with the amount of oil/water I plan on using to avoid any messes and for sanitary reasons. I have yet to use the son any part of m body besides my face, but the jade roller doesn't look large enough for anything other than your face. [5.0/5] Huge! I should have read the description first before ordering! I thought for sure I was getting a little 10ml crystal roller for my purse, but this thing is jumbo!! Not mad about it as I will still use it for perfume oils. But just be aware how big it is. I probably won't be taking this around with me anywhere because the of that. The roller I received is pink quartz and it seems like it's nice quality. Only other thing I wish is that it was made of glass instead of plastic. Overall it's a nice hefty 30ml roller for oils. [5.0/5] Quality Quality product! I haven’t filled it yet, but the stone rolls well and it seems sturdy! [3.0/5] Roller is Small and Sticks I've been searching for years for an easy to refill and clean roller bottle for deodorant. I use Milk of Magnesia because it works great, doesn't make me itch like most deodorants, and is cheap.

Unfortunately, this bottle fell short. The roller is on the small side, doesn't roll well, and doesn't allow enough MoM to come out to be effective. The bottle feels cheap except for the roller ball itself, and is a little small. Seems overpriced to me at $9.90. My search continues.

response:
Roller good for body oils, face massage, essential oils, perfume. Many users happy with smooth application, even dispensing. Jade/quartz ball feel nice and cool on skin. Refrigerator trick make cooling effect better. Good size - bigger than most expect, hold 30ml. Has measurement markings on side. Screw-off roller top make filling easy.

Big problem: bottle leak. Many reviewers mention leaking from top or bottom. Must keep upright. Not good for expensive oils if worried about spills.

One roller fall apart after two uses - ball pop off, would not stay on. Possible defect.

One reviewer say roller too small, not roll well, not good for thick liquid like Milk of Magnesia.

Most say good value, good for travel, face massage, reduce puffiness, help blood circulation. Can use with ice cubes for puffiness and pore shrinking. Plastic bottle, not glass - some wish it glass instead.
